observations: GET /v1/billing/subscription returns {"plan":"free","status":"active"} with HTTP 200 for any authenticated tenant — the GetSubscriptionUseCase is NOT wired in OSS mode so the route defaults to the stub response.
POST /v1/billing/checkout-session returns HTTP 410 Gone with "Billing is disabled in the OSS build. Checkout is not available." — the CreateCheckoutUseCase is NOT wired in OSS mode.
GET /v1/billing/usage returns the tenant's local UsageRecordEntity rows from PgUsageRecordRepository, with limit/cursor pagination — the GetUsageUseCase IS wired and functional in OSS mode.
POST /v1/billing/portal also correctly returns 410 Gone (CreatePortalUseCase not wired).
POST /v1/billing/webhook is not mounted in OSS mode (guarded by !config.isOss() in app.ts).
POST /v1/signup is not mounted in OSS mode (guarded by !config.isOss() in app.ts).

No stripe.com call is made at boot: getStripeClient() is never invoked in OSS mode; the Stripe-dependent use cases (createCheckout, createPortal, getSubscription, etc.) are only constructed in the else branch of the OSS guard in bootstrap.ts.

Quota enforcement (maxParallelInvestigations, maxAgentsPerRun) comes from config.billing which reads env vars MAX_PARALLEL_INVESTIGATIONS (default 10) and MAX_AGENTS_PER_RUN (default 10) — these are used by PgBillingAccountRepository and CheckQuotaUseCase, no Stripe plan is consulted.
Initial dist build was stale (missing the OSS billing guard). After pnpm build + docker compose build causeflow-api + restart, all HTTP checks pass correctly.

All Stripe-dependent routes (/plans, /subscribe, /credits, /invoices, /purchase, /upgrade, /cancel, /reactivate, /settings) return 404 Not Found in OSS mode — they are conditionally registered and the condition (useCases.* present) is false.
